name: React 19: context + ref changes
description: React 19+ only: `ref` is a regular prop; use `use()` instead of `useContext()` for context consumption. Avoid `forwardRef` for new code.

metadata.intent: Apply React 19 context/ref API changes safely during refactors

must_use: React 19+ semantics: ref-as-prop, use() for context
must_not: Introduce forwardRef patterns where ref-as-prop is intended
Keep useContext where project is using use() for context
conventions: If project is React 18 or earlier, do NOT apply this rule.

steps.description: Confirm the codebase is React 19+ before applying ref-as-prop or use() context patterns.
Prefer `use(MyContext)` over `useContext(MyContext)` in React 19+ where supported by codebase conventions.
Prefer `function Input({ ref, ...props })` (ref is a prop) over wrapping with `forwardRef` for new code.
